---
applyTo: "docs/**"
---

# Documentation instructions

Read `/AGENTS.md` first — it is the root law.

## Rules for docs/

1. Only approved categories: tutorials, how-to, reference, explanation, adrs, runbooks.
2. No files at `docs/` root except `index.md`.
3. Evidence and verification outputs go in `/artifacts`, not `/docs`.
4. ADRs use enterprise namespace `VE-DISTRO-ADR-NNNN` and must be registered in `docs/reference/decision-index.yaml`.
5. No duplicate docs covering the same topic.
6. See `docs/reference/doc-governance.md` for the full model.
